name: MERCADOLIBRE INC
summary: MercadoLibre, Inc. is the leading online commerce and fintech ecosystem in Latin America. It operates the Mercado Libre Marketplace (e-commerce), Mercado Pago (digital payments and financial services), Mercado Envios (logistics), Mercado Ads (advertising), and Mercado Libre Classifieds. Present in 18 countries for e-commerce and 8 countries for fintech, it serves consumers and merchants with buying, selling, payments, credit, insurance, savings, and cryptocurrency services.

products.name: Mercado Libre Marketplace
products.description: Online commerce platform for third-party and first-party sellers across 18 Latin American countries, accessible via mobile app or website.

products.name: Mercado Pago
products.description: Fintech platform offering digital payments, POS devices, QR codes, credit cards, lending, insurance, savings, and cryptocurrency services.

products.name: Mercado Envios
products.description: Logistics solution including fulfillment centers, cross-docking, MELI Places, dedicated aircraft, trucks, and last-mile delivery for marketplace sellers.

products.name: Mercado Ads
products.description: Advertising platform offering Product Ads, Brand Ads, Display Ads, and Video Ads to sellers and brands on- and off-platform.

products.name: Mercado Libre Classifieds
products.description: Listings service for vehicles, properties, and services, charging placing fees only rather than final value fees.

products.name: Mercado Shops / Mi Página
products.description: Digital storefront solution for sellers; Mercado Shops migrated to Mi Página in January 2025 and was discontinued December 31, 2025.

products.name: Meli Dólar
products.description: Proprietary stablecoin available within Mercado Pago digital accounts in Brazil, Mexico, and Chile.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
